title: Business Owners
subtitle: Ownership assignments tracking who is responsible for what.

permissions.deniedView: You do not have permission to view business owners.
permissions.deniedCreate: You do not have permission to assign owners.
permissions.deniedEdit: You do not have permission to edit owner assignments.
permissions.deniedDelete: You do not have permission to remove owners.

messages.removedSuccess: The ownership assignment was successfully removed.

removeDialog.title: Remove Owner?
removeDialog.description: This will deactivate the ownership assignment. The history will be preserved.

emptyState.title: No ownership assignments yet
emptyState.description: Assign business owners to data products, contracts, and other objects.
